name: inbox-processor
description: Every 6 hours, process any unclassified items in 00 Inbox/ via vault-capture. The engine's automated filing system.
prompt: Run vault-capture in batch mode. Scan 00 Inbox/ for any .md files without _processed_ prefix. For each, classify, generate frontmatter, find wikilinks, create note in target folder. Move processed items to 00 Inbox/_processed/YYYY-MM-DD/. Report count of items processed.
